positive: A stylized, minimalist cosmic forest scene. Geometric trees with bioluminescent foliage silhouette against a deep indigo nebula backdrop. The composition is centered and symmetrical. Focus on clean, flowing lines and high contrast. The forest floor features luminous river paths and stylized celestial bodies (moons, stars) rendered as glowing orbs. Color palette: Deep sapphire blues, ethereal violets, glowing teal, and metallic gold accents. Style: Highly detailed vector illustration mixed with ethereal watercolor washes, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Cinematic volumetric lighting, perfect symmetry, concept art, highly detailed, 8K.
negative: blurry, lowres, text, watermark, logo, signature, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs, poorly drawn, noise, cartoon, ugly, grainy, bokeh
